text:
We know \( x + \frac{1}{x} = 5 \).  
First, cube both sides:  
\[
\left(x + \frac{1}{x}\right)^3 = x^3 + \frac{1}{x^3} + 3\left(x + \frac{1}{x}\right)
\]  
So  
\[
5^3 = x^3 + \frac{1}{x^3} + 3 \cdot 5
\]  
\[
125 = x^3 + \frac{1}{x^3} + 15
\]  
\[
x^3 + \frac{1}{x^3} = 125 - 15 = 110
\]  

110
